creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text:
Current manual reads the same. I am unable to verify if this is an issue, cc'ing current ntp maintainer.

Reporter (18 years ago) said that this was fixed in ntp 4.2.2. Checking our current ntp 4.2.8p18 manual, it still reads exactly the same. Checking bugs.ntp.org, I couldn't find this issue.
